fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code you want to assign to this tax area. You can enter up to 20 characters, both numbers and letters. It is a good idea to enter a code that is easy to remember.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the tax area. For example, if you use a number as the tax code, you might want to describe the tax area in this field.
